fixed_conditions.method: temp vl-prompt-compare edge function sends imageDataUrl directly to OpenAI (no detectTableBounds)

stability.A_chocolate_nata_gema_all_correct_runs: 3/3 (all three items correct in all 3 runs)

reasoning: Same exact 218-448 crop, same model, no re-crop: A (table-only) and B (full-page) score 5-6/8 with nearly identical per-item errors on run1.
Chocolate, Nata, Gema correct under BOTH prompts on all 3 runs when crop is exact and re-crop avoided.

VL 100% (B_table_only) used full-page prompt B on same crop; current Pass C failures on production path occur with full-image + re-crop confounds, not because table-only prompt is inherently worse on this crop.
Shared failures (Pepino qty/unit, Atum, Açúcar) appear under both prompts — not prompt-specific.

PROVEN: Prompt alone does not explain accuracy difference when crop is fixed
A and B produce equivalent C/N/G results (3/3 runs correct) on exact crop
Re-crop confound avoided via temp direct-to-OpenAI function
LIKELY: Production Pass C failures are driven by pipeline confounds (full-image detectTableBounds, re-crop on pre-cropped input) not prompt text
Remaining 5/8 ceiling reflects inherent OCR variance on this template even under ideal conditions
HYPOTHESIS: VL historical 8/8 on all items may reflect run-to-run luck or slightly different image bytes, not prompt superiority
